description: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the EssayEagle production pipeline. Phases contain workflows. Each workflow produces an output (result.md) that becomes the next workflow's input. At the end of each phase, a phase handover document bundles the document set passed to the next phase and the project status advances. Phases can be re-entered ('go back and redo'). AI assistants and the GUI should treat this file as authoritative. Where the codebase uses a different id, see the 'aliases' field on each workflow.

phase.note: The project's currentPhase points at the phase in progress.

workflow.note: locked = upstream workflow not done yet; ready = inputs available; matches WorkflowState.status in gui/src/lib/types.ts

resume.rule: To resume a project: read project-state.json -> currentPhase + currentWorkflow, then read that workflow's input (the previous workflow's result.md) and the latest _handover/ file. PROJECT.md is the human-readable mirror of this.

goBack.rule: A phase may be re-entered. To redo phase N: set currentPhase to phase N, set its workflows back to 'ready'/'in-progress', set later phases' workflows to 'locked'. Keep prior outputs; supersede them by writing new result.md files. Record the reason in the phase _handover file under 'Revisions'.

perProjectLayout.00 Input: Intake bucket. assessment_brief.md, grading_rubric.md, referencing_style_guide.md, curriculum/, previous_assignments/. Not a workflow.
perProjectLayout.06 Drafting: Workflow: drafting (illustration outputs go in 06 Drafting/illustrations/)

workflowOutputConvention: Each workflow writes its deliverable to '<folder>/result.md'. That file is the handover into the next workflow (its input).

phases.name: Preparation
phases.goal: Understand the assignment and decide what the essay will be about.

workflows.input: Assignment Brief, Grading Rubric, referencing style, constraints (from 00 Input).
workflows.output: Assessment Summary: parsed requirements, rubric criteria, formal constraints, key expectations.
3 topic options with pros/cons, selected topic, preliminary thesis statement.
Theory map: curriculum concepts with placement suggestions and module alignment.

phases.name: Creation
phases.goal: Gather evidence and write the draft.

workflows.output: Source database: citations, key findings, paraphrases, source-quality assessment (references_wiki/).

workflows.input: Assessment Summary, topic, theory map, source database.
workflows.output: Detailed outline: section structure, purposes, word budget, evidence placement.

workflows.input: Detailed outline, paraphrases, theory map, style profile.
workflows.output: Complete draft text ready for quality assessment.

phases.name: Finalisation
phases.goal: Review, fix, and prepare for submission.

workflows.output: FQA report: scored assessment with prioritised improvement actions.
Submission-ready document with all fixes applied.
